update.title: About & Updates
update.appDescription: Batch Rename / ASCII Art / Video Tool
update.autoCheckDesc: Automatically check for new versions when app starts

status.idle: Click the button below to check for new versions
status.downloaded: Update downloaded, app will restart soon...
status.notAvailable: Current version v{{version}} is up to date
status.errorDefault: Failed to check updates, please check network connection

error.offline: You are offline. Please connect to the internet and try again.
error.network: Cannot reach the update server. Please check your internet connection, firewall, or proxy settings.
error.timeout: Connection to update server timed out. Please try again later.
error.signature: Update package signature verification failed. Please try again or contact the developer.
error.parse: Failed to parse update information. The server returned unexpected data. Please try again later.
